name: Marinated Mushrooms (Crocker)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut mushrooms into 1/8-inch slices.
2. Mix mushrooms and lemon juice in a 1½-quart bowl.
3. Stir in oil, parsley, salt, pepper, onions, and garlic; toss.
4. Cover and refrigerate, stirring occasionally, at least 3 hours.
5. Just before serving, remove mixture with a slotted spoon.
6. Sprinkle with paprika; garnish with parsley.
10 servings; 40 calories per serving.
Source: Betty Crockers Cookbook, 6th Edition
